subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! The effulgence of the Kingdom is sanctified and exalted above the limitations and constraints of the mortal world, and is free from the conditions and circumstances of this earthly realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله فیض ملکوت از حدود و قیود ناسوت منزه و مبراست و از شئون جهان چون
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
